title: haplopappus suffruticosus
intro: Haplopappus suffruticosus, also known as low-growing silver ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is known to provide health benefits such as wound healing, soothing digestive issues, and reducing inflammation. Haplopappus suffruticosus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
